name: Okta Password View Events (30 days)
description: Detects password view events in Okta system logs, aligned with public Panther detections for password access activity.
query: SELECT l.uuid AS id, l.actor_id, COALESCE(u.login, u.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS actor_name, l.target_id, l.target_type, l.outcome, l.published FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = l.actor_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) = 'application.user_membership.show_password' AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.outcome, 'success')) IN ('success', 'allow', 'allowed') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Validate password view events against approved support workflows and investigate unexpected or repeated access patterns.
